canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>event horizon</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #000; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: none;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, cx, cy;
let mouseX, mouseY;
let blackHoleX, blackHoleY;
let blackHoleMass = 150;
let time = 0;

const stars = [];
const accretionParticles = [];
const STAR_COUNT = 800;
const ACCRETION_COUNT = 400;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cx = W / 2;
  cy = H / 2;
  blackHoleX = cx;
  blackHoleY = cy;
  mouseX = cx;
  mouseY = cy;
}

function initStars() {
  stars.length = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < STAR_COUNT; i++) {
    stars.push({
      x: Math.random() * W,
      y: Math.random() * H,
      baseX: Math.random() * W,
      baseY: Math.random() * H,
      size: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
      brightness: Math.random() * 0.7 + 0.3,
      twinkleSpeed: Math.random() * 0.02 + 0.01,
      twinkleOffset: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2
    });
  }
}

function initAccretion() {
  accretionParticles.length = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < ACCRETION_COUNT; i++) {
    const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const dist = 80 + Math.random() * 120;
    accretionParticles.push({
      angle: angle,
      dist: dist,
      baseDist: dist,
      speed: 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03,
      size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
      hue: Math.random() < 0.5 ? 300 + Math.random() * 30 : 180 + Math.random() * 20,
      brightness: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5,
      z: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3 // vertical offset for 3D effect
    });
  }
}

// Gravitational lensing - bend light around the black hole
function lensPosition(x, y, bhX, bhY, mass) {
  const dx = x - bhX;
  const dy = y - bhY;
  const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  
  if (dist < 20) return null; // inside event horizon
  
  const schwarzschild = mass * 0.5;
  const bendStrength = schwarzschild / (dist * dist) * 200;
  
  // Einstein ring deflection
  const deflection = Math.min(bendStrength, 0.8);
  const perpX = -dy / dist;
  const perpY = dx / dist;
  
  // Bend towards the black hole then curve around
  const bentX = x + perpX * deflection * dist * 0.5 - dx * deflection * 0.3;
  const bentY = y + perpY * deflection * dist * 0.5 - dy * deflection * 0.3;
  
  return { x: bentX, y: bentY, distortion: bendStrength };
}

function drawBlackHole() {
  // Smooth follow mouse
  blackHoleX += (mouseX - blackHoleX) * 0.03;
  blackHoleY += (mouseY - blackHoleY) * 0.03;
  
  // Event horizon - pure black
  const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(blackHoleX, blackHoleY, 0, blackHoleX, blackHoleY, 60);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,0,0,1)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(0,0,0,1)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
  
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(blackHoleX, blackHoleY, 60, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Photon sphere glow
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(blackHoleX, blackHoleY, 45, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(180, 100, 255, 0.1)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 8;
  ctx.stroke();
  
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(blackHoleX, blackHoleY, 42, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.05)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 3;
  ctx.stroke();
}

function drawAccretionDisk() {
  // Sort by z for pseudo-3D
  accretionParticles.sort((a, b) => a.z - b.z);
  
  for (const p of accretionParticles) {
    p.angle += p.speed * (100 / p.dist); // inner particles orbit faster
    
    // Elliptical orbit for disk perspective
    const tilt = 0.3;
    const wobble = Math.sin(time * 0.5) * 0.1;
    const x = blackHoleX + Math.cos(p.angle) * p.dist;
    const y = blackHoleY + Math.sin(p.angle) * p.dist * tilt + Math.sin(p.angle + wobble) * p.z * p.dist;
    
    // Check if behind black hole
    const dx = x - blackHoleX;
    const dy = y - blackHoleY;
    const distFromCenter = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    
    if (distFromCenter < 35) continue;
    
    // Doppler shift - approaching side brighter
    const dopplerFactor = 1 + Math.cos(p.angle) * 0.5;
    
    const alpha = p.brightness * dopplerFactor * (p.z > 0 ? 0.8 : 0.4);
    const sat = 80 + dopplerFactor * 20;
    const light = 50 + dopplerFactor * 30;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, p.size * dopplerFactor, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${p.hue}, ${sat}%, ${light}%, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Glow for brighter particles
    if (dopplerFactor > 1.2 && p.z > 0) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, p.size * 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%, ${alpha * 0.2})`;
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }
}

function drawStars() {
  for (const star of stars) {
    const lensed = lensPosition(star.baseX, star.baseY, blackHoleX, blackHoleY, blackHoleMass);
    
    if (!lensed) continue; // consumed by the void
    
    star.x = lensed.x;
    star.y = lensed.y;
    
    // Twinkle
    const twinkle = Math.sin(time * star.twinkleSpeed + star.twinkleOffset) * 0.3 + 0.7;
    
    // Brighten near the edge (lensing amplification)
    const amplification = 1 + lensed.distortion * 2;
    const brightness = Math.min(star.brightness * twinkle * amplification, 1);
    
    // Color shift from lensing (gravitational redshift on one side, blueshift on other)
    const dx = star.x - blackHoleX;
    const shift = dx / W;
    const r = Math.floor(200 + shift * 55);
    const g = Math.floor(180 + Math.abs(shift) * 40);
    const b = Math.floor(220 - shift * 35);
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, star.size * amplification, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${brightness})`;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Streak effect for highly lensed stars
    if (lensed.distortion > 0.3) {
      const streakAngle = Math.atan2(star.y - blackHoleY, star.x - blackHoleX);
      const streakLen = lensed.distortion * 20;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(star.x - Math.cos(streakAngle + Math.PI/2) * streakLen, 
                 star.y - Math.sin(streakAngle + Math.PI/2) * streakLen);
      ctx.lineTo(star.x + Math.cos(streakAngle + Math.PI/2) * streakLen,
                 star.y + Math.sin(streakAngle + Math.PI/2) * streakLen);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${brightness * 0.5})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = star.size * 0.5;
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
}

function drawEinsteinRing() {
  // Faint Einstein ring at critical radius
  const ringRadius = 90;
  const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    blackHoleX, blackHoleY, ringRadius - 10,
    blackHoleX, blackHoleY, ringRadius + 10
  );
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(180, 100, 255, 0)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.08)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(180, 100, 255, 0)');
  
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(blackHoleX, blackHoleY, ringRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.strokeStyle = gradient;
  ctx.lineWidth = 20;
  ctx.stroke();
}

function drawHawkingRadiation() {
  // Occasional quantum fluctuation at the event horizon
  if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
    const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const radius = 38 + Math.random() * 5;
    const x = blackHoleX + Math.cos(angle) * radius;
    const y = blackHoleY + Math.sin(angle) * radius;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 1 + Math.random() * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 200, 255, ${0.3 + Math.random() * 0.4})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }
}

function draw() {
  // Fade trail effect
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  time += 0.016;
  
  drawStars();
  drawEinsteinRing();
  drawAccretionDisk();
  drawBlackHole();
  drawHawkingRadiation();
  
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}

window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  resize();
  initStars();
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  // Pulse the mass briefly
  const originalMass = blackHoleMass;
  blackHoleMass = 250;
  setTimeout(() => {
    blackHoleMass = originalMass;
  }, 500);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  mouseX = e.touches[0].clientX;
  mouseY = e.touches[0].clientY;
});

resize();
initStars();
initAccretion();
draw();
</script>
</body>
</html>
